name: kling_generate
description: Generate video via Kling v3 Omni. Standalone mode: pass --prompt and --ref-image directly. Project-aware mode: pass --project-id and --scene-id and the step reads the project, composes the prompt (styleAnchor + ref clause + inline tokens), generates, and saves the clip to tracks[0]. Also supports multi-shot (up to 6 scenes in one API call).

params.name: prompt
params.description: Scene description (max 2500 chars). Required in single-shot mode and in multi-shot intelligence mode; invalid in multi-shot customize mode.

params.name: first-frame
params.description: Starting image. Not supported in multi-shot mode.

params.name: last-frame
params.description: Ending image (requires --first-frame). Not supported in multi-shot mode.

params.name: duration
params.description: Clip length in seconds (3-15). Ignored in multi-shot customize mode (derived from sum of multi_prompt durations).

params.name: model
params.description: kling-v3-omni (flexible durations, multi-shot) | kling-video-o1 (newer, 5s/10s only, no multi-shot)

params.name: external-task-id
params.description: Caller correlation ID echoed back by Kling on queries

params.name: multi-shot
params.description: Enable multi-shot mode (up to 6 scenes in one API call)

params.name: shot-type
params.description: customize|intelligence. Required when --multi-shot is set. customize = caller defines each shot via --multi-prompt; intelligence = Kling splits a single --prompt into shots.

params.name: multi-prompt
params.description: JSON array of storyboard entries: [{"index":1,"prompt":"...","duration":"3"}, ...]. 1-6 entries, per-prompt cap 512 chars. Required when --shot-type=customize.

params.name: project-id
params.description: Project ID. When set with --scene-id, enables project-aware mode: step reads project, composes prompt, generates, and saves clip to tracks[0].

params.name: scene-id
params.description: Scene ID within the storyboard. Requires --project-id.
